label: Static site (HTML/CSS/JS)
buildGuidance: Author a COMPLETE, SELF-CONTAINED static website that renders from LOCAL files opened directly in a browser (file://). Put an index.html at the project root with semantic HTML; put the brand styling in a relative-linked styles.css (or an inline <style>); keep any JS inline or in a relative-linked script.js. Do NOT use ES modules (type=module), fetch(), or any server/build step -- everything must work from the file system. Style to the requested brand WITHOUT copying any real trademarks, logos, or copyrighted assets.
